description_long: This sushi piece features a plump, segmented topping with a glossy, slightly translucent orange-pink hue, resembling a piece of ebi (shrimp) or a similar seafood. The topping is carefully draped over a compact mound, with subtle ridges and folds that give it a natural, organic appearance. Small, delicate legs or appendages are visible peeking out from beneath the topping, enhancing the impression of a whole shrimp or crustacean. The sushi sits on a flat, circular gray surface, which contrasts with the vibrant color of the topping. There are no visible garnishes, sauces, or additional toppings present. The overall form is compact and rounded, with a smooth, moist surface texture typical of fresh seafood sushi.
description: A plump, segmented orange-pink sushi piece resembling whole shrimp, with delicate appendages and a glossy, moist surface, resting on a flat gray base.
description_view_0: The side view highlights the segmented, curved body and visible appendages beneath the sushi topping.
description_view_1: The front view shows the rounded end of the sushi, with the appendages more prominently visible and the segments converging toward the viewer.
description_view_2: The opposite side view emphasizes the curved, segmented back and the subtle shine of the topping.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the rounded tail end, with the segments and appendages partially visible beneath the topping.
